title: Bulbophyllum transarisanense

The genus Bulbophyllum is further divided into 2 subgenera: Bulbophyllum and Basiphyllaea. The species Bulbophyllum transarisanense is native to the tropical regions and is often found growing on trees in the wild. It is classified as a terrestrial orchid, which grows in the ground and has a unique bulb-like structure.
